last_added.title: A wildfire near Bordeaux forces 20,000 people to flee as France's third heatwave of the summer turns the land tinder-dry
Russia fires over 100 drones and missiles at Ukraine overnight, killing two people in a Donetsk apartment strike
India's paper-leak protest movement calls a nationwide strike today, as Delhi Metro shuts stations for a third straight day
India's government is quietly discussing letting Adani and GMR — its own airport operators — own airlines too
